ddls:
CREATE TABLE "turbine_performance" (
  "wind_number" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the wind turbine */,
  "time_recorded" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was recorded */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Speed of the wind at the time of recording */,
  "power_output" REAL /* Power output of the turbine at the time of recording */,
  "rotor_speed" REAL /* Speed of the rotor at the time of recording */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the turbine location */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the turbine location */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the turbine location */,
  "vibration" REAL /* Vibration levels of the turbine */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the turbine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wind_number", "time_recorded"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turbine_performance_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turbines" (
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each turbine */,
  "turbine_name" TEXT /* Name assigned to the turbine */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the turbine */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the turbine was installed */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the turbine */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the turbine */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the turbine */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the turbine's warranty */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled inspection */,
  "total_operational_hours" INTEGER /* Total operational hours of the turbine */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance activity occurred */,
  "activity" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "technician_name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Area of specialization */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the technician */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the technician */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the technician */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the technician */,
  "last_training_date" TEXT /* Date of the last training session attended by the technician */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine for which the weather data is relevant */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather data was recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time of recording */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time of recording */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Atmospheric pressure at the time of recording */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction at the time of recording */,
  "wind_chill" REAL /* Wind chill factor */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Amount of precipitation */,
  "visibility" REAL /* Visibility at the location */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Percentage of cloud cover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_optimization" (
  "optimization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each optimization suggestion */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine for which the suggestion is made */,
  "suggestion_date" TEXT /* Date when the suggestion was made */,
  "suggestion" TEXT /* Description of the optimization suggestion */,
  "estimated_gain" REAL /* Estimated improvement in performance */,
  "implementation_date" TEXT /* Date when the suggestion was implemented */,
  "actual_gain" REAL /* Actual improvement in performance after implementation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the optimization suggestion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("optimization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_optimization_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictive_maintenance" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance alert */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine that requires maintenance */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was issued */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Description of the issue detected */,
  "recommendation" TEXT /* Recommended action to address the issue */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the issue */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the maintenance alert */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictive_maintenance_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine whose data was accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data entry */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date for which the historical data is recorded */,
  "average_wind_speed" REAL /* Average wind speed for the day */,
  "average_power_output" REAL /* Average power output for the day */,
  "average_rotor_speed" REAL /* Average rotor speed for the day */,
  "total_energy_produced" REAL /* Total energy produced for the day */,
  "total_operational_hours" INTEGER /* Total operational hours for the day */,
  "total_downtime" INTEGER /* Total downtime for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "turbine_location_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "installation_coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the turbine's installation location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turbine_location_mapping_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_turbine_location_mapping_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "climate" TEXT /* Climate type of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alert_subscriptions" (
  "subscription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subscription */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who subscribed */,
  "turbine_id" INTEGER /* ID of the turbine for which alerts are subscribed */,
  "subscription_date" TEXT /* Date when the subscription was created */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of alerts */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subscription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_subscriptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alert_subscriptions_turbine_id FOREIGN KEY ("turbine_id") REFERENCES turbines ("turbine_id")
)
